communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Texas Public Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Related to a reported incident involving the recovery of minor children by law enforcement in El Paso, Texas on or about February 5, 2019.

Specifically, I request:

• Incident reports
• Offense reports
• Arrest records (if any)
• Dispatch / CAD logs
• Any reports or logs referencing coordination with the U.S. Marshals Service
• Any records relating to custodial interference, missing children, welfare checks, or recovery of minors

This request pertains to records involving one or more of the following individuals:

• Daniel Gary Chandler (also known as Daniel Gary Salmon)
• April Chandler
• Bertha Salmon

including any records where these individuals are listed as subject, reporting party, victim, or associated person.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Wayne Whitney

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Texas Public Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Relating to any incident, report, or investigation in El Paso, Texas in which April Chandler was alleged to have been involved in an incident involving a firearm.

Specifically, I request:

• Incident reports or offense reports naming April Chandler as a suspect or involved party
• Any complaints or statements made by Bertha Salmon relating to such an incident
• Any arrest warrants, warrant applications, or probable cause affidavits relating to April Chandler
• Any related dispatch / CAD logs

This request pertains to records involving one or more of the following individuals:

• April Chandler
• Daniel Gary Chandler (also known as Daniel Gary Salmon)
• Bertha Salmon

including any records where these individuals are listed as subject, reporting party, complainant, witness, or associated person.

If any portion of this request is unclear or overly broad, please advise so that I may narrow it.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Wayne Whitney

title: Annual NCAA MFRS FY25 Report (Eastern Kentucky University)

communications.subject: Kentucky Open Records Act Request: Annual NCAA MFRS FY25 Report (Eastern Kentucky University)
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Kentucky Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Greetings,

I am looking to make a request for records related to your athletic department.

1) I would like a copy of the annual NCAA MFRS report for FY2017 - FY2025. These annual reports are submitted by the athletic department and record the revenue/expenses of the department. It is an approximately 90 page document listing revenue and expenses in the athletic department by team. It is a standard annual NCAA form. The latest FY2025 report was due, 1/15/2025 so should be available. If you are unable to include this, can you please specify if you will send it to me immediately when it's available or if you want me to make a new request. That should be 9 reports combined.

2) I'd like copies of the latest contracts for your athletic director and head coaches of football, mens/womens basketball, and mens/womens ice hockey if you have those teams. That should be 6 documents if you have that many teams.

Please let me know if you have any questions. Thank you for your time.

Best,

Greg Chick

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Greg Chick
